title: Awaits
description: Exploring personal growth and relationship dynamics.
lyrics: The next time I talk to you We'd pass through this hell All that makes you feel so very unwell All this hell Something always passes All this hell Finds where your head spins And baby, oh well Talkin' up to livin', baby, know you feelin' it Talkin' up to just understandin' You're not the best at it all Mistakes come back Take you out of this fuckin' crazy shit Take you out of this, somethin' more always For you, oh To breathe a little higher, baby, feel it with me Somethin' always passes Hell Passed all that bullshit in your brain, baby I've been feelin' nice around you It's been feelin' nice to get out of the night and feel the sun, baby Just a little bit of that love What more for us to waste? Is it more for us than Is it more for us than anyone more always? Oh, oh, oh Oh, oh, oh Oh, oh, oh Touch me up, baby And we go from here Somethin' about it better than we were before What are we? What are we?

lyricsSegments.text: The next time I talk to you
All that makes you feel so very unwell
Talkin' up to livin', baby, know you feelin' it
You're not the best at it all
Take you out of this fuckin' crazy shit
Take you out of this, somethin' more always
To breathe a little higher, baby, feel it with me
Passed all that bullshit in your brain, baby
I've been feelin' nice around you
It's been feelin' nice to get out of the night and feel the sun, baby
Just a little bit of that love
What more for us to waste?
Is it more for us than
Is it more for us than anyone more always?
Somethin' about it better than we were before
